candidates.name: BNB/USDT 4h Trend Momentum
candidates.description: Eligible only in a confirmed uptrend (ADX + bullish EMA stack + positive slope); enter on 2-of-3 confluence and ride until the 20/50 stack breaks. ATR risk bracket.
candidates.reasoning: Trend momentum (regime-gated): only fires when ADX confirms a trend and the EMA stack is bullish with positive slope; needs 2-of-3 of {MACD>0, RSI>mid, EMA100>EMA200}, then rides until the 20/50 stack rolls over. Signal context: regime=risk_on, F&G=63, funding=0.0120%. [walk-forward: 10 OOS windows, beat buy&hold in 40%; median OOS -3.54% vs benchmark +0.19%; OOS Sharpe -0.64, OOS maxDD 21.8%, 102 trades, risk_score 29/100.]

candidates.name: BNB/USDT 4h Mean-Reversion (range, confirmed turn)
candidates.description: Eligible only in a low-ADX range; buy a CONFIRMED reversion turn off the range floor (2-of-3 confluence), exit at the band mean.
entry_rules: at_least 2 of [rsi_14 crosses_above 35; close > open; macd_hist rising]
candidates.reasoning: Mean-reversion (regime-gated): only in a low-ADX range, buy a confirmed turn (2-of-3 of {RSI reclaim, up-close, MACD rising}) that has reclaimed the range floor; exit at the band mean. No knife-catching in trends. Signal context: regime=risk_on, F&G=63, funding=0.0120%. [walk-forward: 10 OOS windows, beat buy&hold in 50%; median OOS -5.49% vs benchmark +0.19%; OOS Sharpe -2.59, OOS maxDD 19.4%, 98 trades, risk_score 33/100.]

candidates.name: BNB/USDT 4h Donchian Breakout
candidates.description: Enter on a close above the prior-20-bar high confirmed by a volume surge in a trending tape (ADX); wide ATR target.
entry_rules: at_least 2 of [close > ema_50; rsi_14 > 55; ema_50 > ema_100]
candidates.reasoning: Breakout: ride volatility expansion when price clears the prior-20-bar high on above-average volume with ADX confirming a trend, plus 2-of-3 confluence (mid-trend, RSI thrust, stack alignment).
